values.name: rule
values.comment:
Reports when a call to `Regex.fromString` is going to fail because the input is wrong.

    config =
        [ Validate.Regexes.rule
        ]


## Fail

    a =
        Regex.fromString "[a-z+\\""


## Success

    a =
        Regex.fromString "[a-z]+"


## Try it out

You can try this rule out by running the following command:

```bash
elm-review --template miniBill/elm-review-validate-regexes/example --rules Validate.Regexes
```
